purpose: Manual monitoring checklist to track whether MAIA market price/volume behavior confirms, ignores, or contradicts the strong insider buying evidence

institutional_visibility.status: Partial implementation - no reliable institutional holdings detected

clinical_programs.critical_unknown: THIO-104 Phase 3 data timing not disclosed

baseline.evidence_matrix_conclusion: Strong insider-evidence / high clinical-timing uncertainty profile

reference_levels.significance: Primary reference price for market confirmation analysis

reference_levels.note: To be manually recorded or auto-populated via verified public quote source

weekly_checklist.description: Record weekly price range and note compression/expansion

weekly_checklist.check_name: Price reaction to MAIA IR updates
weekly_checklist.description: Record price reaction to press releases or investor presentations

weekly_checklist.check_name: Price reaction to new SEC filing
weekly_checklist.description: Record price reaction to Form 4, Form 144, 13D/G, 10-Q/10-K, S-1/S-3
Assess whether price holds new level or reverts; record duration
Record volume ratio vs. recent average on high-volume days

weekly_checklist.check_name: Price gap up or gap down
weekly_checklist.description: Record gap size (percentage) and whether gap filled or held
Flag if daily volume drops significantly below average
Flag if wide bid-ask spread is manually observed
Record percentage above/below recent 30-day average volume

confirmation_levels.confirming: New purchase + price holds above $1.50 on rising volume
confirmation_levels.neutral: New purchase + price stable, no significant volume change
confirmation_levels.cautionary: New purchase + price breaks below $1.50 on heavy volume
confirmation_levels.requires_pm_review: If price diverges sharply despite new purchase
First sale regardless of price/volume behavior
First Form 144 regardless of price/volume behavior
New 5%+ beneficial ownership regardless of price/volume behavior

event_driven_checks.baseline_reference: THIO-104 Phase 3 data timing not disclosed

confirmation_levels.confirming: Positive clinical update + price up on heavy volume
confirmation_levels.neutral: Update neutral or minor, price/volume stable
confirmation_levels.cautionary: Negative update + price down on heavy volume
confirmation_levels.requires_pm_review: If update is major milestone or data readout
Critical unknown resolved regardless of price/volume behavior

confirmation_levels.confirming: Price holds above offering price on stable/rising volume
confirmation_levels.neutral: Price stable, no major volume reaction
confirmation_levels.cautionary: Price drops on heavy volume after financing filing
confirmation_levels.requires_pm_review: If offering price significantly below $1.50 or dilution substantial

confirmation_levels.confirming: Strong cash position, stable burn, no going-concern issues, price stable/up
confirmation_levels.neutral: Expected burn, stable cash runway, no surprises
confirmation_levels.cautionary: Going-concern language added, burn accelerating, cash runway dropping
confirmation_levels.requires_pm_review: If runway drops below 12 months or going-concern language changes
Financing need imminent regardless of price/volume behavior

pm_review_triggers.trigger_name: Price closes below $1.50 for 5 consecutive trading days
pm_review_triggers.significance: Sustained break of March 2026 offering price

pm_review_triggers.trigger_name: Price reclaims $1.50 and holds for 5 consecutive trading days on elevated volume
pm_review_triggers.threshold: 5 consecutive days above $1.50 with volume above average

pm_review_triggers.trigger_name: Price declines >25% in one week without company explanation
Price surges >50% in one week on heavy volume
pm_review_triggers.threshold: >50% increase in 5 trading days with volume spike

pm_review_triggers.trigger_name: Volume consistently <50% of recent average for 5+ days

pm_review_triggers.significance: Prolonged pause after 21 months of active purchasing

pm_review_triggers.trigger_name: Clinical trial update (enrollment complete, enrollment halted, etc.)

pm_review_triggers.threshold: S-1, S-3, or registered direct offering filed

manual_observation_template.usage_instructions: Weekly minimum entry; event-driven entry for any PM review trigger; manually record price/volume data or integrate verified public quote source

limitations: Price/volume data is manual-entry unless verified public quote source is integrated
Form 4 filings due within 2 business days of transaction; price reaction may precede public filing
Form 144 filings indicate intent to sell, not completed sale; actual sale timing not disclosed
13F-HR filings have 45-day lag from quarter-end; holdings data is stale
13F parser success rate is 60%; no-match conclusion scoped to successfully parsed filings only
13F only reports long positions >$200k or >10k shares threshold
THIO-104 Phase 3 data timing is not disclosed (critical unknown)
Clinical updates depend on MAIA voluntary disclosure; no automatic source exists
Rule 10b5-1 trading plans are not always disclosed; cannot distinguish planned vs. discretionary trades
future_automation: Automated price/volume data integration via public quote API (Alpha Vantage, Yahoo Finance, IEX Cloud)
Automated PM review trigger detection and alert generation (email/Telegram if PM approves)
Form 4 price correlation analysis - match transaction prices to market closing prices
Expanded 13F parser coverage beyond current 60% success rate
Clinical milestone calendar automation - parse press releases and 10-Q/10-K for milestone updates
Cash runway auto-update from latest 10-Q/10-K with automatic PM review trigger when <12 months
